name: fanbasis
one_liner: FanBasis is an all-in-one business infrastructure platform that provides payment orchestration, checkout services, and fulfillment automation for online entrepreneurs.
api_notes: The API covers core business operations including payment creation, checkout session management, and webhook events. It also provides SDKs for Node, Python, PHP, and Ruby.
access_notes: Developers can generate API keys directly from the FanBasis dashboard after logging in.

evidence.claim: The FanBasis API uses API keys for authentication and provides a sandbox environment for testing.
Search citation: FanBasis — Payments Infrastructure That Makes You More Money
Search citation: How To Use FanBasis App - Ultimate Guide (2025) - YouTube

auth_notes: Authentication is performed by including an x-api-key header in requests.
mcp_notes: No official or community MCP server was identified in the documentation.
